content.en:
Woowoo!!!

The extradimensional storm descended, and the terrifying power of the storm swept through several extradimensional territories around it.

It is difficult for ordinary peak realm gods to survive in such an environment, and only those powerful peak realm gods can barely survive in the extradimensional storm, but they can't go deeper.

However, for Ye Tian in the extradimensional realm, a mere extradimensional storm was nothing more than a breeze.

He walked in the extradimensional storm, and he was disturbed at all, and his will tore through the extradimensional storm, covering a huge area, looking for the extradimensional elves of the first realm.

But it was not easy to find the superdimensional elves of the first realm, so Ye Tian continued to go deep into the superdimensional storm, so that the chance of encountering superdimensional elves was greater.

this day.

Ye Tian finally saw the superdimensional elves, but they were only superdimensional elves in the half-step superdimensional realm.

Although such a super "two-six-seven" dimensional elf is of little value to him, he still kills it, and such a super-dimensional elf can be left to the human race to comprehend the power of the super-dimensional.

After that, he continued to search for the existence of extradimensional elves.

During this period, he also encountered other extradimensional realms, after all, they all wanted to hunt extradimensional elves.

Of course, this kind of hunting is also dangerous, in case of encountering a very powerful extra-dimensional realm, the general first extra-dimensional realm is also at risk of falling, and the core of the extra-dimensional storm is the territory of the extra-dimensional elves, and the extra-dimensional realm does not dare to go deep.

But Ye Tian was not worried about this problem.

As he continued to go deeper, he finally encountered the extradimensional elves of the extradimensional realm.

"This realm master, you have crossed the boundary, this is the territory of our extradimensional elves!"

In the depths of the extradimensional storm, figures emerged one after another, and the terrifying aura seemed to be able to make the extradimensional storm stagnate.

Extradimensional Realm!

Extradimensional Realm!

It's still extra-dimensional!

Dozens of extradimensional realms and a large number of half-step extradimensional elves of the extradimensional realm seemed to be standing on an invisible boundary line, looking down, and the terrifying aura made Ye Tiandu startled.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly.

This sound annoyed many extradimensional realm super-dimensional elves, and immediately ten super-dimensional elves at the peak of the first realm killed Ye Tian.

Ye Tian did not flee immediately, but only started to flee when the other party was about to come.

Ten extradimensional elves kept chasing and killing, and he kept pretending to escape.

He knew very well that if he wanted to blend in with the extradimensional elves, he had to have a normal identity, so he had to kill one of the first-realm extradimensional elves, and then copy the other party's body to replace his identity, otherwise it would be easy to be discovered.

Next.

Ye Tian fought with these super-dimensional elves from time to time, and did not show the super-dimensional rules from beginning to end, and under Ye Tian's desperate efforts, one of the super-dimensional elves was injured and was ready to return.

And Ye Tian had already copied the body of this superdimensional elf, just waiting for the other party to go back.

On the way back, Ye Tian's other replica body was ready to intercept it.

"Extradimensional Annihilation!"

This super-dimensional supernatural power burst out, instantly killing the injured first-realm super-dimensional elf.

Then, Ye Tian's super-dimensional elf copied his body to replace his body, and took all the items on his body, so that he could be perfectly replaced.

Subsequently, Ye Tian let the injured extradimensional elf copy the body back.

......

At this time.

Ye Tian had already returned to the territory of the superdimensional elves, and he cultivated in the territory of the superdimensional elves on the grounds of health preservation.

Secretly, he spied on the situation here, listened to the conversations of the extradimensional elves, and gradually learned about the situation of the extradimensional elves.

According to the information currently available, this location belongs to the boundary of the extradimensional void where the extradimensional elves are located, and every time an extradimensional storm appears, this boundary will be rendered useless.

Therefore, the extra-dimensional elves have been sending many extra-dimensional elves to guard here. []

Moreover, during the Extradimensional Storm, the Extradimensional Elves can find a substance called the Extradimensional Storm Crystal from the Extradimensional Storm, which helps the Extradimensional Elves to improve their bloodline and cultivation.

This is also the reason why some extradimensional elves will come out, but if they come out, they may encounter cultivators and extradimensional creatures in the extradimensional territory, and they will face some dangers.

Of course, there is both risk and chance.

If the extra-dimensional elves kill the extra-dimensional realm in the extra-dimensional realm, they can also obtain the wealth of the extra-dimensional realm, and those belongings will also help them improve their strength0 ...

However, the extra-dimensional elves who really come out are still in the minority, so there are not many extra-dimensional realms that come to hunt.

Time passed slowly, and an extradimensional epoch passed.

At this time, although the extradimensional storm has not yet ended, the boundary of the extradimensional void where the extradimensional elves are located has gradually recovered, and there is no need for so many extradimensional elves to guard it.

Ye Tian took the opportunity to follow the other extradimensional elves back to the superdimensional elf clan land.

Next, Ye Tian integrated into the superdimensional elf clan as this superdimensional elf named Mouton Realm Lord.

And here, Ye Tian saw a huge divine tree that was enough to cover one-tenth of the extradimensional territory.

"The Wood of the Mother of Mist!"

This is the name of this sacred tree, and it is the true foundation of the extradimensional elves.

And this divine tree grows 108,000 Mist Mother Fruits, each Mist Mother Fruit is equivalent to the size of an extradimensional realm, Ye Tian never thought that there would be such a big fruit, this is the first time he has seen it.

The inside of the Mother of Mist Fruit is empty, and a large number of extradimensional spirits inhabit it.

The bloodline of many extra-dimensional elves is very ordinary, not pure-bred super-dimensional elves, only equivalent to the cultivation of the pinnacle realm gods, these super-dimensional elves can only live inside the fruit of the mist mother located at the lower end of the wood of the mother of fog.

The Fog Mother Fruit in this position has relatively thin energy inside, and the cultivation environment is far inferior to the Fog Mother Fruit in the upper part. 4.6

And the top-notch Fog Mother Fruit is all inhabited in the extradimensional realm.

The barrel realm master copied by Ye Tian was a high-status extradimensional realm, living inside the thirty-sixth Fog Mother Fruit, where hundreds of extradimensional realms lived, each of whom occupied a huge territory.

And the cultivation environment here is better than the eternal realm where the human race is located, I don't know how many times.

If you practice here, the speed of cultivation is far beyond that of the outside world.

"The outside world knows too little about the extra-dimensional elf clan, and there are too many extra-dimensional realms of the extra-dimensional elf clan!"

Ye Tian saw at least a thousand extra-dimensional realms along the way, and this was just the tip of the iceberg of the super-dimensional elf clan!

Moreover, the fruit of the first ten mist, even if it is the identity of the Mouton realm master, is not qualified to enter, and if you want to enter, you must at least comprehend the extradimensional rules.
